title: Neurid Studio: The New Sanctuary
description: Welcome to the future of high-fidelity music management. Nuclear has evolved into Neurid Studio.
items: Total Reengineering: Every core component has been rebuilt for maximum performance and premium aesthetics.
Neurid AI 2.0: A completely new natural language engine that manages your library and streams intuitively.
Premium Glassmorphism: An immersive, dark design language with neon-glow highlights and smooth animations.
Player Sanctuary: A new floating playback bar with precise controls and an immersive layout.
Connectors Hub: Unified management for local music libraries and cloud streaming services (Spotify, Deezer, YouTube).
Native Performance: Removed legacy plugin overhead for a faster, more stable experience.
Enhanced Audio Engine: Improved local file support for FLAC, ALAC, and high-bitrate audio formats.
